---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Lore CLI
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Be as specific as you can -- command syntax, expected output, configuration options.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why were they insufficient?

## Context

- Does this relate to the Lore protocol specification, or is it a CLI-only concern?
- Would this be useful for AI agents, human developers, or both?
- Any related issues or discussions?
